sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application Nos. 76 & 77 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection Nos. 12 & 27. 2. For orders on CMA No. 704/2024. (Exp) 3. For hearing of main case. 24.11.2025 Mr. Ameer Nausherwan Adil, advocate for applicant. Per learned counsel, these reference applications have become infructuous, same may be disposed of as such. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected file. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
